headline: Q4 Cybersecurity Earnings: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) Earns Top Marks
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the cybersecurity industry, including CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) and its peers.

headline: Jim Cramer Defends CrowdStrike Against Anthropic Narrative
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) is included in Mad Money’s latest recap as Jim Cramer outlined his strategy for market sell-offs. Cramer explained why AI disruption worries could be wrong, as he said: There’s a private company, it’s called Anthropic. They’re developing an AI model with unchecked agent abilities that theoretically could have tremendous cybersecurity powers. […]

headline: Wall Street Says Buy CrowdStrike And Watch It Gain $100 This Year
summary: Benchmark analyst Yi Fu Lee initiated coverage of CrowdStrike Holdings (NASDAQ:CRWD) with a Buy rating and a $500 price target, arguing the cybersecurity platform leader has a clear path to $10 billion in annual recurring revenue and sits at the center of a $150 billion total addressable market. The initiation arrives as CrowdStrike stock trades ... Wall Street Says Buy CrowdStrike And Watch It Gain $100 This Year

headline: CrowdStrike Plunges 21% in 6 Months: Time to Hold or Fold the Stock?

headline: Will Rising Adoption of Next-Gen SIEM Boost CRWD's Revenue Growth?
summary: CrowdStrike's Next-Gen SIEM ARR surpasses $585M in Q4 FY26, growing more than 75% Y/Y as enterprises replace legacy tools and consolidate security platforms.

headline: Iran threatens Nvidia, Apple and other tech giants with attacks
summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has warned a number of tech companies with Middle East operations that they'll be considered "legitimate targets."
